NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PETITIONER SCOTT, PHILIP L.B. HEARING SET FOR JUL-17-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-17-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

SPECIAL ENTRY OF APPEARANCE FOR THE PURPOSES OF CONTESTING JURISDICTION IN RESPONSE TO THE PETITION TO CONFORM A CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD OF SANCTION S AND MEMO IN SUPPORT FILED BY RESPONDENT LOPEZ, EDGAR CARRILLO JR., RAUL A.

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER PHILIP SCOTT'S PETITION IS CONTINUED TO JULY 30, 2009. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE A REPLY BRIEF ON OR BEFORE JULY 24, 2009. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER PHILIP SCOTT'S PETITION TO CONFIRM A CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD OF SANCTIONS IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ESTABLISHED THE JURISDICTION OF THIS COURT OVER RESPONDENTS IN THIS ACTION, EVEN IF THE COURT HAD JURISDICTION, RELIEF WOULD BE DENIED BECAUSE THERE IS NO FINAL ARBITRATION AWARD. REQUEST FOR STATEMENT OF DECISION IS DENIED. MR. CARRILLO IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
APPENDIX OF NON-CALIFORNIA AUTHORITIES FILED BY PETITIONER SCOTT, PHILIP L.B.
MTN TO VACATE JUL 30, 09 HEARING FILED BY RESPONDENT LOPEZ, EDGAR CARRILLO JR., RAUL A.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-30-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
